benefits.description: Noticed improvement in overall skin appearance
BPC injected IM into shoulder for shoulder injury; feels relief pretty fast

side_effects.description: Ankle scar appears darker and worse compared to previous scars where peptides were not used, despite sun protection and top-tier surgeon

protocol_notes: Used KLOW before and after ankle surgery (scar on top of foot). BPC injected IM into shoulder for a separate shoulder injury. Noted scar is on foot (lower extremity), which may affect healing. Continued use despite unclear scar benefits due to perceived skin improvement.
